name: caveman
description: Ultra-focused concise-response control with ultra and off modes.

interface.shortDescription: Makes replies ultra-short and easier to scan.
interface.longDescription: Adds the `toggle` skill for turning ultra-compressed chat mode on or off.
defaultPrompt: Use caveman:toggle for ultra-short replies in this chat.
Enable caveman:toggle for ultra-short progress updates while coding in this chat.
Use caveman:toggle off and reply normally again.
